prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite
Primary request: remake this Mirage Seer while preserving its lighter controller silhouette, but match the pixelation level and painterly sprite finish of the approved Aevum Guardian instead of looking overly smooth or overly chunky
Subject: the same lean prophetic controller with wrapped face, narrow layered head-wrap, open sleeves, one hanging lantern-like ritual focus, and one calm psychic-control hand gesture; lighter and less burdened than the approved Memory Keeper and less martial than the approved Aevum Guardian
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D tactics sprite with the same moderate pixelation level as the approved Aevum Guardian, visible but not extreme pixel clustering, broader value grouping, simplified cloth forms, and a clean sprite finish that reads well around 102 to 108 px tall
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, grounded stance, transparent background, tight sprite bounds
Lighting/mood: solemn dust-filtered dusk light with restrained contrast and only a tiny sacred-tech glow in the hanging focus
Color palette: use the approved Aevum Guardian palette with sun-bleached bone white cloth, ash beige wraps, muted rust red sash accents, worn brown leather, and tiny ghostly teal details used sparingly
Constraints: preserve the Mirage Seer silhouette and controller identity from the input image; match the approved Aevum Guardian's pixelation level and rendering finish more closely; keep the figure lighter than Memory Keeper, without staff, spear, polearm, broad hat, bulky pouches, or heavy cloak mass; prioritize readable shapes and simplified cloth layering without dropping into exaggerated low-resolution chunkiness; exactly one subject; no floor; no scenery; no text; no extra subjects; no oversized empty padding
Avoid: glossy rendering, soft painterly blur, extremely blocky 8-bit chunkiness, detailed fabric micro-texture, cinematic shading, neon magic, anime rendering, ornate fantasy robes, cinematic background, noisy micro-detail
